item.text:
I can’t sort out login in this checkout as-is: there is no login/auth code here. I checked the repo and it only contains the oh-my-brain harness plus `demo/rate_limiter.py`; no app routes, UI, users table, session handling, OAuth config, or auth tests are present.

Also, the workspace is read-only right now, so I can inspect and diagnose but cannot edit files.

To proceed, send one of these:

1. The repo/files that contain the login flow.
2. The specific symptom: can’t log in, can’t stay logged in, wrong redirect, bad password handling, signup/login mismatch, etc.
3. Any error message or failing test related to auth.

--- Learning check ---

What part of a login flow do you think is failing here: credential verification, session/token creation, redirect/routing, or protected-route checking?
